---
title: "Computer Programming I (Python)"
format: html
---

# Welcome

This site contains the materials for the Computer Programming I (Python) course.

Use the sidebar to navigate modules and lessons. Lessons include exercises with collapsible solutions (use the dropdown toggle to reveal answers).

You can render the site locally with `quarto render` and publish to GitHub Pages with `quarto publish gh-pages`.

---

## Quick links

- [Syllabus](syllabus.qmd)
- [Modules](/modules/)
